project_type: Python Colab notebook (single-file) for AI video generation using ComfyUI backend
build_system: None (single .py file, validated via AST parse)
test_framework: AST parse validation only (no test suite)
verification_instructions: Run AST parse check to confirm valid Python syntax after all edits
setup_instructions: No setup needed - this is a single-file project
environment_constraints: No external packages or runtime available. The file must remain AST-parseable Python. No Colab/ComfyUI runtime to test against.
contribution_requirements: All Colab shell commands (! and %) must remain commented out. Code must be valid Python (AST parseable).
key_patterns: ComfyUI NODE_CLASS_MAPPINGS pattern for node instantiation; get_value_at_index() for extracting tuple results; aggressive_cleanup() and force_unload_all_models() for VRAM management; VAE is loaded via NODE_CLASS_MAPPINGS['VAELoader']().load_vae(vae_name=X); Audio VAE via _load_audio_vae() helper
directory_structure: Single directory with LTX_PRO.py (main 7084-line file to modify), LTX2EasyPromptLD.py (reference for SYSTEM_PROMPT), and workflow JSON files
